use_cases: Selecting a single option from a group of mutually exclusive choices
Switching between view modes or display options
Navigation between sections or content areas
Filtering or sorting content by category
Toggling between different tool or format options
ai_summary: A segmented toggle group component that allows users to select one option from a set of mutually exclusive choices. Built on Ark UI with Tailwind CSS styling, featuring dark mode support and smooth state transitions. Ideal for tab navigation, view mode switching, or preference settings in web applications.
